heading: Identification of vehicles
label: 609 Identification of vehicles
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60940:491(k)., title II, § 211(k), as added , ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(c)64 Stat. 583Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1211, § 268 Stat. 1128
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60940:491(k)., title II, § 211(k), as added , ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(c)64 Stat. 583Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1211, § 268 Stat. 1128

children.label: A
children.text: the full name of the department, establishment, corporation, or agency that uses the vehicle and the service for which the vehicle is used; or

children.label: B
children.text: a title that readily identifies the department, establishment, corporation, or agency that uses the vehicle and that is descriptive of the service for which the vehicle is used; and

children.heading: .—Exceptions
children.label: b .—Exceptions
children.text: The regulations prescribed pursuant to this section may provide for exemptions when conspicuous identification would interfere with the purpose for which a vehicle is acquired and used.
